query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds, awayMLOdds, homeMLOdds, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine FROM games WHERE (awayTeam = 'STL' OR homeTeam = 'STL') AND sport = 'nhl' LIMIT 5;
